steps.title: Spot the opening question
steps.content: The passage opens with “Were penguins always flightless?” This question immediately frames what the rest of the text addresses.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: The underlined sentence answers that opening question by presenting Cole's team's position on penguin evolution. The other choices either claim it contradicts the next sentence, suggest the question is unresearched, or attribute terminology work to it—none of which describes the sentence's actual function. This matches choice A — A is correct.
